title: Intercompany Reconciliation Workpaper Template
shortDescription: Reconcile intercompany balances by entity pair, flag differences, document explanations, and produce a close-ready Summary.
about:
Use this practical workpaper to match due-to, due-from, intercompany revenue, cost, loan, and recharge entries before consolidation. Enter or paste transactions in blue cells. The workbook calculates entity-pair differences, flags matched, review, and unresolved items, and summarizes open exceptions.

Sample rows show timing, FX, and missing-counterparty scenarios. Set a tolerance, attach supporting evidence outside the workbook where required, and resolve each exception before posting eliminations.
excerpt: Free Excel intercompany reconciliation workpaper with transaction-level difference controls, status flags, sample data, and a printable summary.

leadQuestions.label: How many legal entities do you reconcile each month?
What creates the most intercompany close friction?
